root_cause: The test expected version 1.0.0 but the actual version was 1.0.1.
evidence_lines: test	test	2023-10-01 10:00:30 AssertionError: expected version 1.0.0 but got 1.0.1
remediation_steps: Update the version in the test to match the expected version.
Ensure that the correct version is specified in the package configuration.
